questionText: How many days does one Concordia year have, split across how many seasons?

answerHumanSummary: 33:1 compression (5-20 regulars per MEGA, every 30 ticks).

questionText: How many parallel cognitive brains does Concord run?
answerHumanSummary: Four (conscious / subconscious / utility / repair) plus a fifth vision brain (LLaVA).
